title: Restaurant Website
description: Full-stack restaurant landing page with online ordering and reservation system.
problem: Restaurants needed a digital presence to manage orders and reservations.
solution: Built a responsive website with integrated order management.
business_impact: Increased online orders by 40% for the client.

title: HonourGrid Labs
description: Research collaboration platform for economics students to share and publish working papers.
problem: Lack of a centralized platform for student research.
solution: Developed a minimal platform with paper submission and peer review.

title: Analytics Projects – Market Research
description: Data-driven market research projects analyzing consumer trends and business performance.
problem: Businesses needed actionable insights from raw data.
solution: Performed data cleaning, visualization, and predictive modeling.
business_impact: Provided strategy recommendations that improved ROI.

title: AI Automation Projects
description: Exploring AI-powered automation for business processes and research workflows.
problem: Manual processes were inefficient and time-consuming.
solution: Built automation scripts and AI models to streamline tasks.

title: Business Development Initiatives
